name: NRHIS Sprint 2 Build055 TWDB Reservoir Operations Harvest
features: harvest Choke Canyon Reservoir and Lake Corpus Christi current conditions from TWDB Water Data for Texas
normalize storage, capacity, percent full, elevation, volume, and surface area
calculate prior-snapshot storage changes and combined system storage
write duplicate-safe reservoir history and raw-source evidence
flag stale reservoir observations and create a machine-readable harvest receipt
preserves: workflow contract and CI parity gates
pre-release publication, verification, archival, and next-build chaining
